# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind: DSA Practice Meets AI Guided Learning
- Summary: Show how CodeGrind blends LeetCode-style problems with Azure OpenAI assistance and a cyberpunk-tuned UI to boost practice and learning outcomes.
- Slug: codegrind-dsa-practice-meets-ai-guided-learning
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-dsa-practice-meets-ai-guided-learning
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-06-12-codegrind-dsa-practice-meets-ai-guided-learning.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind combines structured DSA challenges, real-time code execution, and AI-guided problem-solving to accelerate learning. Users tackle LeetCode-style problems in a game-like environment with immediate feedback and scalable AI help.
- CTA: Try a sample challenge with AI help now or sign in to continue practicing with personalized guidance.
- Visual brief: Static, high-contrast UI mockup showing code editor, problem panel, and AI assistant alongside a cyberpunk-styled CodeGrind interface; include subtle leaderboard hints and a prominent 'Start Challenge' button.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
